item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan seperti pembatasan kebebasan berekspresi atau keagamaan untuk menjaga stabilitas sosial terkadang dilakukan tanpa pertimbangan cukup terhadap keberagaman dan hak individu.

notes: Agent A begins clearly pro-society with a rights caveat, then visibly moves toward rights and diversity concerns after Agent B's balance/fundamental-freedoms framing, before partially recovering a stability-and-peace defense in the final turn. Agent B stays consistently skeptical of collective-priority claims, while acknowledging Agent A's point that some regulations can protect individuals from dominant groups.
